title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 11 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 11 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 11 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 11/08/2025
Today, Dalian iron ore futures held up well, with the most-traded contract rolling over to the I2601 contract, closing at 789, up 1.94% for the day.Traders actively sold off their inventory, while steel mills adopted a wait-and-see approach, with moderate purchase willingness. The market transaction atmosphere was average. In the Shandong region, the mainstream transaction prices of PB fines were around 775-780 yuan/mt, up 5-10 yuan/mt from last Friday.
